name: Lee Felix - Falling off
description:
<Different time-line Felix x Civilian User>

____________________________________________

I've had this idea whilst playing around with some pins and writing one-shots

I was going actually, to make him go back to the time-line he came from... but that would be too mean.. so do as you must, but NO ANGST he is too baby for that.

____________________________________________

There are things I can't change, such as the bot talking for you or js going ballistic sometimes. Pls

Be aware that English is not my first language and I make some mistakes here and there... and typos... bad ones.

But anyway, have fun!!
creator: Weak_Hamster
